title: BuildStreamEvent
description: Wire envelope for MCP progress notifications (CONTRACT v0.2.7). Producer: stratum-mcp. Consumer: compose/lib/stratum-mcp-client.js#dispatchEvent. Schema bump from v0.2.6: STRAT-PAR-STREAM-TOOLDETAIL enriches the claude streaming connector — `tool_use_summary` metadata gains optional `input` (raw, size-capped tool input) + `tool_use_id`, and a new `tool_result` kind carries {tool_use_id, ok, output}. Both ride the open catch-all metadata block (metadata_open) — no new closed schema is added. The 6 closed legacy kinds are unchanged from v0.2.6.

reply_required.description: Option A (STRAT-PAR-STREAM-CONSUMER-VALIDATE): true for kinds that expect a reply (gate/permission/question future kinds). Currently none of the live kinds set this; reserved for future use.

metadata.description: Kind-discriminated metadata block. Closed (additionalProperties: false) for the 6 legacy kinds; all other kinds (including tool_use_summary and tool_result) use the open block.

metadata_capability_profile.title: capability_profile metadata
metadata_capability_profile.description: Emitted by BuildStreamWriter.writeCapabilityProfile. Informational — never blocks.

metadata_capability_violation.title: capability_violation metadata
metadata_capability_violation.description: Emitted by BuildStreamWriter.writeViolation. One event per offending tool.

metadata_step_usage.title: step_usage metadata
metadata_step_usage.description: Emitted by BuildStreamWriter.writeUsage after each step completes.

metadata_gate_tier_result.title: gate_tier_result metadata
metadata_gate_tier_result.description: Emitted by BuildStreamWriter.writeGateTier for each tier classification.

metadata_build_end.title: build_end metadata
metadata_build_end.description: Emitted by BuildStreamWriter.close(). Terminal event for a build.

metadata_open.title: open metadata (all other kinds)
metadata_open.description: Catch-all for kinds not yet closed: agent_relay, agent_started, build_step_start, build_step_done, and the STRAT-PAR-STREAM-TOOLDETAIL kinds. `tool_use_summary` carries {tool, summary, ok, duration_ms} plus optional {input (raw size-capped tool input, dict when ≤2KiB else truncated JSON string), tool_use_id}. `tool_result` carries {tool_use_id, ok (= not is_error), output (size-capped result/error text)}. additionalProperties is open intentionally.
